final_plan:
#Task1: Retrieve historical data for chiller 9 with equipment ID CWC04009 for June 2020.
#Agent1: IoT Data Download
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: Historical data for CWC04009 in June 2020, including relevant sensor readings.
#Task2: Analyze the retrieved data to identify any anomalies or operation violations.
#Agent2: Time Series Analytics and Forecasting
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: Analysis report highlighting any anomalies or operation violations in the data for CWC04009.
#Task3: Check if there are any corrective work orders scheduled for CWC04009 based on the anomalies detected.
#Agent3: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency3: #S2
#ExpectedOutput3: List of corrective work orders scheduled for CWC04009, if any.
#Task4: Determine if a new work order should be generated based on the analysis and existing work orders.
#Agent4: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency4: #S2 #S3
#ExpectedOutput4: Recommendation on whether to generate a new work order for CWC04009.
